sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108651" key="u(pokwqwni/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκωθωνίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n108651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">indulge in deep potations,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.414</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
